# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline { 
    agent any 

    stages {
        stage('Parameter Input'){
            steps {
                script {
                    build_params = params.string(description: 'Enter your Build Parameters', name: 'BUILD_PARAMS')
                    test_script = params.string(description: 'Enter your Test Scripts', name: 'TEST_SCRIPTS')
                    deploy_step = params.string(description: 'Enter your Deployment Steps', name: 'DEPLOY_STEPS')
                }  
            }
        } 

        stage('Build Execution'){
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Running Build Commands..."
                    sh build_params
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Testing'){
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Test Scripts..."
                    sh test_script
                }  
            }
        }

        stage('Deployment'){
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Running Deployment Steps..."
                    sh deploy_step
                } 
            }
        }
    }
}
